title: ochnaceae
intro: The Ochnaceae rank is a botanical family of flowering plants, commonly known as the Polynemaceae family of family Ochnaceae is now widely accepted, but some taxonomists still refer to it as Polynemaceae. The family Ochnaceae consists of about 33 genera and over 200 species of plants, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Members of the Ochnaceae family are often evergreen shrubs or small trees with simple leaves and a variety of flower shapes. The family Ochnaceae is native to the Americas, Africa, Asia, and Australia, with the majority of species found in Central and South America.
